data.title: Asia Markets Gain, Europe Slides, Crude Prices Up On Iranian Sanctions - Global Markets Today While US Slept
data.description: U.S. markets closed lower due to Nvidia's warning and Fed Chair Powell's remarks. Retail sales rose, while industrial production declined. Asian markets were mixed. Oil prices rose on supply concerns, gold and silver prices fell. Dow futures up, dollar strong.

data.title: China Slashes US Oil Imports By 90% Amid Trump Tariffs, Turns To Canada Instead
data.description: China reduces US oil imports by 90%, turns to Canadian crude amid trade tensions. US-China conflict has potential to shift global oil market dynamics.

data.title: Whistleblower Says DOGE May Have Caused Major Cybersecurity Breach At US Labor Agency
data.description: DOGE workers accused of major data breach at federal labor agency. Sensitive data was accessed and possibly stolen.
